BUILD FAILED:

╭─ Error at line 14:4
│      χ 1 * χ 1 = χ (1 * 1) := by rw [map_mul]
│     ^^^
╰─ error: invalid 'calc' step, left-hand side is
  χ 1 * χ 1 : @Units ℂ Complex.instSemiring.toMonoidWithZero.toMonoid
but is expected to be
  χ 1 : @Units ℂ Complex.instSemiring.toMonoidWithZero.toMonoid

╭─ Error at line 15:4
│      _ = χ 1 := by simp
│     ^^^
╰─ error: invalid 'calc' step, right-hand side is
  χ 1 : @Units ℂ Complex.instSemiring.toMonoidWithZero.toMonoid
but is expected to be
  1 : @Units ℂ Complex.instSemiring.toMonoidWithZero.toMonoid
